'''''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords'': Prima Official Game Guide''' is the official [[Prima Games]] guide to ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''.

==Publisher's summary==
'''You are the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic's]] only hope . . . or biggest threat.'''
*Detailed stats, equipment, and ability descriptions for all party members
*Covers all main allies and foes
*Exhaustive [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Mastery]] helps you master each Jedi class
*Detailed maps for every [[Planet/Legends|planet]] and location
*Construct the ultimate weapon and armor kits with our expert workbench tips
*All Secret Powers unearthed!
*All [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Party Members Revealed!
*The best ranged and melee weapons combat tested and approved!
